case_title: BRICK & TIMBER, INC. VS. KRISTIN ROLAND ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROLAND, KRISTIN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE. NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 75209066) AS TO DEFENDANT ROLAND, KRISTIN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE ($123.16/DAY) (TRANSACTION ID # 75246767) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75067673) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. SERVED NOV-18-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE NOV-18-2024 AS TO DEFENDANT ROLAND, KRISTIN

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ROLAND, KRISTIN
